lines.speaker: Haera
lines.text: What are you doing in our home?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I just came to ask you a question.

lines.speaker: Haera
lines.text: Hegir, why did you let this human into our home?

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: I didn't let him in, he let himself in!

lines.speaker: Haera
lines.text: Now what do you want, human? Speak up, speak up!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I ehm, just wanted some information.

lines.speaker: Haera
lines.text: Well go ask someone else instead of barging into people's homes!

lines.speaker: Hegir
lines.text: There's no need to be rude to the human, Haera dear.

lines.speaker: Haera
lines.text: Now don't you dear me. I'll do whatever I please.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I think this is my cue to leave...

lines.speaker: Haera
lines.text: Don't talk to me like that!
